<?php /** * This code was generated by * \ / _ _ _| _ _ * | (_)\/(_)(_|\/| |(/_ v1.0.0 * / / */ namespace Twilio\TwiML\Voice; use Twilio\TwiML\TwiML; class Parameter extends TwiML { /** * Parameter constructor. * * @param array $attributes Optional attributes */ public function __construct($attributes = []) { parent::__construct('Parameter', null, $attributes); } /** * Add Name attribute. * * @param string $name The name of the custom parameter */ public function setName($name): self { return $this->setAttribute('name', $name); } /** * Add Value attribute. * * @param string $value The value of the custom parameter */ public function setValue($value): self { return $this->setAttribute('value', $value); } }
